channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hamas military chief reportedly killed amid Israeli air strikes in Gaza
item.description: Mosques in northern Gaza have reported the death of Izz al-Din al-Haddad, commander of Hamas' military wing, following Israeli air strikes targeting him. Israeli authorities confirmed he was a key pla...

item.title: Lupita Nyong’o to Play Helen of Troy and Clytemnestra in Christopher Nolan’s Epic Film
item.description: Oscar-winning actress Lupita Nyong’o is coming back to the big screen in a major way. Director Christopher Nolan has confirmed that she will play not one but two of Greek mythology’s most famous women...

item.title: Joint U.S. and Nigerian Operation Kills Senior ISIS Leader Abu-Bilal al-Minuki
item.description: U.S. and Nigerian forces conducted a coordinated operation targeting a high-ranking leader of the Islamic State. President Donald Trump announced that the strike resulted in the death of Abu-Bilal al-...

item.title: Analysing Ramaphosa’s Response Amid the Phala Phala Controversy
item.description: In this edition of The Political Arena, journalists Lizeka Tandwa, Hajra Omarjee, Sibongakonke Shoba, and Kgothatso Madisa dissect the political turbulence surrounding President Cyril Ramaphosa follow...

item.title: Bali Offers Spiritual Renewal, Cultural Experiences and Warmth to Indian Tourists
item.description: Bali has become a favourite destination for Indian travellers seeking both adventure and spiritual peace. The island attracts newlyweds like Rajesh and Aarti from Delhi who enjoy beaches, water sports...

item.title: Komuravelli Railway Station Completed; Public Opening Expected Soon
item.description: Union Minister for Coal and Mines, G. Kishan Reddy, announced on Saturday, May 16, 2026, that the new railway station at Komuravelli has been completed and is expected to open for public use either in...

item.title: APC clears 81 aspirants for House of Representatives primaries in Benue State
item.description: For Benue State, the All Progressives Congress (APC) don clear 81 aspirants wey wan contest for the House of Representatives across the state's 11 federal constituencies. According to our corresponden...

item.title: Overview of Rodrigo Duterte's Conditions in ICC Detention Center
item.description: Former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte is currently held at the ICC detention center in The Hague, Netherlands, facing trial on crimes against humanity related to his controversial war on drugs. ...

item.title: Sierra Leone agrees to accept West African migrants deported from the US
item.description: Sierra Leone has confirmed it will accept hundreds of West African migrants being deported from the United States under a new agreement, the country's foreign minister, Timothy Kabba, told Reuters. Th...

item.title: Trump DOJ Reportedly Plans $1.776 Billion Settlement Fund Against Alleged Biden Administration Misconduct
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice under President Donald Trump is reportedly finalizing a plan to secure a $1.7 billion settlement from the IRS. The settlement stems from a $10 billion lawsuit Trump file...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh to give financial incentives for third and fourth child to support population growth
item.description: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu on Saturday declared cash incentives to encourage families to have more children, in response to the state's declining population trend. Families will...

item.title: Sundowns and AS FAR prepare for first leg of Champions League final at Loftus
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns are gearing up to host Moroccan side AS FAR at a sold-out Loftus Versfeld Stadium on Sunday at 4pm, in the first leg of the 2026 CAF Champions League final. Sundowns coach Miguel Car...

item.title: Anthony Jennings shares his thoughts on past cheating allegations
item.description: Anthony Jennings recently spoke out regarding the cheating controversy that previously surrounded him. In a candid interview, he expressed that he has already moved on from the situation and is focusi...

item.title: NDMA Warns of Rising Temperatures with Possible Scattered Rains and Thunderstorms in Parts of Pakistan
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) through its National Emergency Operation Centre (NEOC) has issued a weather advisory indicating a steady increase in temperatures across Pakistan star...

item.title: Eldoret DJ Janet Jerop Attempts 50-Hour No-Sleep Challenge to Raise Awareness Amid Health Concerns
item.description: An Eldoret-based entertainer, Janet Jerop, popularly known as DJ Hot Jantex, has sparked conversation online after starting a 50-hour no-sleep challenge aimed at raising awareness about her health con...

item.title: Jeridah Andayi and Daughter Share Lighthearted Fashion Moment Online
item.description: American-based former radio presenter Jeridah Andayi recently went viral after a playful video of her teasing her daughter, Norah Zawadi, about a tummy-revealing outfit surfaced online. In the clip sh...

item.title: Scheduled Winter Maintenance by Rand Water and Eskom May Affect Gauteng Water Supply
item.description: Rand Water has announced that residents and businesses across Gauteng should prepare for possible water supply interruptions from May 29 to July 17, 2026, due to critical maintenance work by both Rand...

item.title: Ombudsman Remulla Validates Senate Report on Flood Control Projects and Prepares Multiple Complaints
item.description: Ombudsman Jesus Crispin Remulla announced that his office is thoroughly validating the partial report from the Senate Blue Ribbon Committee regarding irregularities in flood control projects. During a...

item.title: Dom Guyot: Cebuano Artist Making Waves in Manila’s Music Scene
item.description: Dom Guyot, a multitalented singer, songwriter, and dancer from Cebu, is steadily carving a name for himself in the Philippine music scene. Growing up inspired by pop and R&B icons like Beyoncé, Rihann...

item.title: Victor Osimhen hails his happiest period at Galatasaray after helping them win fourth straight title
item.description: Victor Osimhen, di Super Eagles striker, don talk say him dey enjoy di most fulfilling part of him career since e join Galatasaray. Di Nigerian forward don really shine for Turkey dis season, scoring ...
